recap:
- Create and register SQL and Python functions in Unity Catalog for AI Agent applications.
- Conduct initial testing of Unity Catalog functions using various methods.
- Equip functions with the necessary context tailored for AI Agent scenarios.
- Test Unity Catalog functions in AI Playground utilizing different tools.
- Identify and differentiate the tools used by the agent and their application in workflows.
- Compare the advantages of SQL versus Python tools within agent workflows.
- Focus on best practices for building and deploying UC functions, excluding advanced frameworks like DSPy or LangChain.
